title: Polymath — Prerequisites
description: Directed prerequisite edges between courses. courseId depends on prerequisiteId (courseId ← prerequisiteId). Unlike K-12 micro-topic deps, these are course-level and cross-disciplinary.

courseId.description: The course that requires prior knowledge

prerequisiteId.description: The course that must be completed first

strength.description: strict=hard requirement, recommended=strongly advised, helpful=background knowledge

crossDiscipline.description: True when prerequisite crosses discipline boundaries (e.g. Math for CS)
